description: Triggers when user needs UI/UX design intelligence including style selection, color palettes, font pairings, and design system generation
should_trigger: Design a landing page for my SaaS product
Choose a color palette for a healthcare dashboard
What font pairing works for a fintech app?
Create a glassmorphism-style admin panel UI
Build a dark mode dashboard with bento grid layout
Generate a design system for my e-commerce site
Review my UI for accessibility and UX issues
should_not_trigger: Fix an accessibility bug in my ARIA implementation
Write copy for my landing page
Setup SEO metadata for my pages
